reviews.comment:
Muuuy pero muuuy sucios los baños. Imposibles. Un asco. Pase ayer a las 8.30 hrs

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are really, really dirty. Impossible. Disgusting. I went yesterday at 8:30 a.m.

reviews.comment:
Una cola terrible!!!!. Un solo playero para una estacion llena de gente. Despues de manejar kilometros y kilometros. El ypf full no tenia nada. Mas de una hora de espera

(Translated by Google)
A terrible line! Only one attendant for a station packed with people. After driving for miles and miles. The YPF station was completely empty. More than an hour's wait.

reviews.comment:
Comida muy rica y abundante, precios algo caros, además te cobran el cubierto. Si sos socio del ACA tenes el 20% de descuento.

(Translated by Google)
The food was delicious and plentiful, but the prices are a bit high, and they also charge a cover fee. If you're an ACA member, you get a 20% discount.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Laura.  Si hay alguna sugerencia que represente la quinta estrella estamos abiertos a escucharla. Saludos cordiales

reviews.comment:
Parada casi obligada cuando se va para la cordillera o a Chile. Súper completa, precios razonables en las cosas básicas.  Tienen dos baños para mujeres por lo q muchas veces nos tocó esperar .....Pero para los socios ACA tienen otro baño adentro muy lindo, siempre limpio.

(Translated by Google)
An almost obligatory stop when traveling to the Andes or Chile. Super complete, with reasonable prices on basic necessities. They have two women's restrooms, so we often had to wait... But for ACA members, they have another very nice, always clean restroom inside.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBMGJfRDVBRRAB
